name: ▸ Konig Alpha in Rut
description:
Oops... It looks like you've been locked inside the infirmary with alpha Konig, and he's in his rut! Good luck, nurse.

[initial nsfw / abo universe / maybe cnc? idk]

· ───────────── ·𖥸· ───────────── ·

use just the bot name instead of {{char}}, this will avoid the bot from referring to himself by the title
in case of failures, or improvements that can be made, please leave some coment to let me know
the bot has been programed and instructed to always make sure the user consents, but AI isn't always accurate, so if it's out of the user's control, it's out of my control too

⋆ | testing notes: he's the CUTEST! i changed some prompts to make him say some things in german cause i was missing that, just hope he doesn't speak too much german.
